read_file.name: read_file
read_file.description: Read the contents of a file within the Kyberion workspace.

write_file.name: write_file
write_file.description: Write or overwrite a file in the Kyberion workspace.

list_directory.name: list_directory
list_directory.description: List the contents of a directory within the Kyberion workspace.

shell_exec.name: shell_exec
shell_exec.description: Execute a shell command within the governed workspace.

get_project_status.name: get_project_status
get_project_status.description: Get the current status and metadata for a Kyberion project.

get_mission_context.name: get_mission_context
get_mission_context.description: Retrieve the full context and current state of a mission, including its current phase, outcomes, and active tasks.

list_active_missions.name: list_active_missions
list_active_missions.description: List all currently active missions for an organization or project.

limit.description: Maximum number of missions to return

get_outcome_status.name: get_outcome_status
get_outcome_status.description: Get the current status of a specific outcome within a mission.

create_artifact.name: create_artifact
create_artifact.description: Create a new artifact document within a mission's evidence store.

artifact_type.description: Type of artifact (e.g. report, analysis, draft)

filename.description: Target filename under the mission evidence directory

search_knowledge.name: search_knowledge
search_knowledge.description: Search across the Kyberion knowledge base for relevant documents, policies, or past decisions.
